name: Agor
subtitle: AI agent orchestration from your iPhone
description: Agor is a multiplayer canvas for orchestrating Claude Code, Codex, and Gemini sessions. Manage git worktrees, track AI conversations, visualize work on spatial boards, and collaborate in real-time — all from your iPhone.
